description: Schema for Produnto package manifest files (produnto.json).

^[a-z0-9-]{2,128}$.description: The package name in the specified language.

description.description: A short localised description of the package.

^[a-z0-9-]{2,128}$.description: The package description in the specified language.

license.description: SPDX identifier for the license under which the package is released.

url.description: The URL of the package homepage. Optional: use source-url and doc-url if there is no separate homepage.

collab-url.description: The URL of a human-readable entry point for source code review and contributions. For example, a GitLab project page.

doc-url.description: The URL of the documentation page.

issue-url.description: The URL of the package's bug tracker.

modules.description: A map of each global Scribunto module name to its implementing file, relative to the package root.
